title: dryopteris biformis
intro: Dryopteris biformis, also known as the two-formed wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris biformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
